en: I'm being spontaneous! Oh! Truman! Ha, ha, ha.
Forget Fiji. Can't very well drive to Fiji, can we? No!
ko: 피지는 잊어. 피지에서 운전할 수는 없잖아, 그치? 아니!

en: Ha, ha, ha. Ha, ha, ha. Ha, ha, ha. What about Atlantic City?
Oh, no. You hate to gamble. That's right, I do, don't I?
ko: 아, 안 돼. 너 도박 싫어하잖아.

en: So why would you want to go there? Because I never have.
That's why people go places. Isn't it? Truman.
ko: 가본 적이 없으니까. 사람들이 여행 가는 이유가 그거잖아?

en: Truman, I think I'm going to throw up. Me too.
ko: 트루먼. 트루먼, 나 토할 것 같아. 나도!

en: Ha, ha, ha. Ha, ha, ha.
Beautifully synchronized, don't you agree? You're blaming me for the traffic? Should I?
You're right. We could be stuck here for hours.
ko: 맞아. 여기서 몇 시간 동안 갇힐 수도 있어.

en: We could be like this all the way to Atlantic City. Let's go back.
